# Pull request

## Summary

Describe the purpose of this pull request and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes locally.
- [ ] Relevant commands or scripts were tested manually.
- [ ] GitHub Actions is green.
- [ ] Documentation was added or updated when necessary.
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or machine-specific data were committed.

## Compatibility

- [ ] The change was validated on Apple Silicon.
- [ ] Intel compatibility was considered where relevant.
- [ ] Unsupported or untested environments are documented.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, logs, limitations, rollback notes, or related issues when useful.
